tasks.title: Bootstrap UI mode execution layer
tasks.summary: Create mode registry and base UI mode scaffold without disturbing architecture-refactor flow.
done_when: Mode resolver deterministically maps ui-overhaul to ui-window-system
UI mode state, config, and task graph exist and are parseable
architecture-refactor task/state paths remain unchanged
behavior_invariants: ui-window-system must not reuse docs/refactor/tasks.json
ui-window-system must not reuse .codex/refactor-state.json

tasks.title: Add wrapper and helper mode plumbing
tasks.summary: Make wrapper, selector, updater, reconciliation, and manifest workflows mode-aware.
done_when: Wrapper resolves mode-specific task/state/config and writes mode metadata to lock
Unsupported mode family stops with BLOCKED_NEEDS_HUMAN
Explicit wrong path override is rejected as mode/path conflict
behavior_invariants: architecture-refactor remains default mode
shared lock prevents cross-mode concurrent writers

tasks.title: Finalize foundation verification baseline
tasks.summary: Stabilize smoke matrix and mode-specific install/export consistency.
done_when: All smoke scenarios pass
Installer/exporter preserve UI mode seed-state and mode filter semantics
Progress doc records repo-local scope boundary
behavior_invariants: No generic kernel changes are introduced in this pass

tasks.title: Build controls token baseline
tasks.summary: Define control token baseline and explicit control family mapping.
done_when: Control token mapping is documented and linked to implementation files
Button/input/list control families are explicitly scoped
No shell-stage task starts before control token baseline completes
behavior_invariants: Token changes must keep readability and compact sizing constraints

tasks.title: Unify button and input control family
tasks.summary: Implement unified button/input styles and state visuals with compact sizing.
done_when: Primary/secondary/danger buttons share one style family
Input controls have consistent corner, border, and focus behaviors
Existing settings windows use unified styles without inline hard-coded overrides
behavior_invariants: No new heavy animation or expensive visual effect is introduced

tasks.title: Unify list, tab, and menu control family
tasks.summary: Align list/tab/menu states and spacing for management and settings windows.
done_when: List and tab selection states use the same visual grammar
Context menu and toolbar dropdown styles are consistent
Management windows no longer mix incompatible list style patterns
behavior_invariants: Selection contrast remains readable in projector scenarios

tasks.title: Migrate dialog shell baseline
tasks.summary: Apply unified dialog shell layout and action bar behavior to lightweight dialogs.
done_when: Dialog windows use consistent title/content/action regions
Action button ordering and sizing are unified
Dialog close/owner semantics remain unchanged
behavior_invariants: Modal owner and focus handoff behavior must not regress

tasks.title: Migrate management shell baseline
tasks.summary: Apply unified management shell to resource and list management windows.
done_when: Management windows share header/content/footer shell regions
Toolbar and list content spacing is shell-consistent
No shell-level owner/topmost behavior regressions are introduced
behavior_invariants: Window movement and z-order coordination remain orchestrator-controlled

tasks.title: Migrate work and fullscreen shell baseline
tasks.summary: Parent closure complete: work/fullscreen shell baseline was split into child tasks and both children are now completed with verification evidence.
done_when: Work shell is consistent for MainWindow and RollCallWindow
Fullscreen shell keeps content-first layout and light controls
Topmost and activation behavior remain policy-safe
behavior_invariants: No extra heavy transparency effects are introduced

tasks.title: Migrate work shell baseline for MainWindow and RollCallWindow
tasks.summary: Apply unified work-shell baseline to MainWindow and RollCallWindow first, without changing owner/topmost policies.
done_when: MainWindow and RollCallWindow share a consistent work-shell structure
Window-level activation and topmost policies remain unchanged
Window-shell verification remains green for work windows
behavior_invariants: No extra heavy transparency effects are introduced

tasks.title: Migrate fullscreen overlay shell baseline
tasks.summary: Apply unified fullscreen shell baseline to overlay windows with content-first layout and light controls.
done_when: Fullscreen overlays keep content-first layout with restrained control chrome
Topmost and activation behavior remain policy-safe
Window-shell verification remains green for overlay windows
behavior_invariants: No extra heavy transparency effects are introduced

tasks.title: Theme freeze manual gate
tasks.summary: Human approval gate for visual tokens and shell baseline.
done_when: A human explicitly approves theme tokens and shell baseline
behavior_invariants: No main-scene window polish starts before this gate is resumed

tasks.title: Polish MainWindow scene
tasks.summary: Apply final main-scene visual hierarchy and compact controls to MainWindow.
done_when: MainWindow primary actions have unified visual hierarchy and compact sizing
Bottom utility actions are visually secondary and style-consistent
MainWindow interaction tests remain stable
behavior_invariants: MainWindow startup and owner relationships must not change

tasks.title: Polish RollCall and timer scene
tasks.summary: Apply final main-scene hierarchy and readability constraints to RollCall and timer visuals.
done_when: RollCall scene uses clear name-first hierarchy and stable control density
Timer scene keeps high legibility and restrained visual effects
RollCall tests remain passing
behavior_invariants: RollCall remote control and timer behavior must not regress

tasks.title: Polish toolbar and overlay scene
tasks.summary: Apply compact and coherent visual language to toolbar and fullscreen overlays.
done_when: Toolbar groups are compact, consistent, and icon sizing is unified
Overlay controls remain content-first with restrained chrome
Overlay-related tests remain stable
behavior_invariants: Overlay input passthrough and topmost behavior remain policy-driven

tasks.title: Main scene freeze manual gate
tasks.summary: Human approval gate for main scene visual and interaction consistency.
done_when: A human approves main-scene freeze result
behavior_invariants: Management/settings polish cannot begin before this gate resumes

tasks.title: Polish image manager and student list windows
tasks.summary: Apply management visual hierarchy and shell consistency to image manager and student list windows.
done_when: Image manager adopts unified management shell and compact control density
Student list view aligns with management shell visual grammar
Management interactions remain stable
behavior_invariants: File/navigation workflows must remain functionally unchanged

tasks.title: Polish settings dialog family
tasks.summary: Apply unified settings shell and compact form language across settings dialogs.
done_when: Settings dialogs share one shell structure and action bar
Form spacing and typography are consistent across settings windows
Settings save behavior remains unchanged
behavior_invariants: No configuration schema or persistence format changes are introduced

tasks.title: Polish lightweight dialog and utility tail windows
tasks.summary: Apply final polish pass to lightweight dialogs and utility windows.
done_when: Utility dialogs share consistent compact appearance and control density
Quick palette and board color dialogs align with visual token baseline
No dialog activation/focus regressions are observed
behavior_invariants: Dialog owner and topmost semantics remain unchanged

tasks.title: Fullscreen and float freeze manual gate
tasks.summary: Human approval gate for fullscreen/overlay/floating visual behavior freeze.
done_when: A human approves fullscreen and floating scene freeze result
behavior_invariants: Final visual regression cannot begin before this gate resumes

tasks.title: Run final visual regression verification stage
tasks.summary: Prepare final visual regression package and acceptance evidence checklist.
done_when: Final visual regression checklist is complete and documented
Acceptance doc captures unresolved risks and explicit pass/fail evidence
Reconciliation check reports no stale authoritative docs
behavior_invariants: Completion is blocked when reconciliation is stale

tasks.title: Final visual regression manual gate
tasks.summary: Final human approval gate before claiming ui-window-system automatable tasks done.
done_when: A human records final visual regression approval with evidence
behavior_invariants: Wrapper must refuse ALL_AUTOMATABLE_TASKS_DONE when this gate is unresolved
